title: Centre for New Economy and Society - Home
text:
Centre for the New Economy and SocietyCentre for the New Economy and SocietyProviding a platform for leaders to shape inclusive, equitable economies and societies for all.We are shaping new models and standards, driving scalable and collaborative action for systemic change The Centre for New Economy and Society is building a future where economies and societies work for everyone. Acting as a hub for thought leaders and innovators, our centre is committed to fostering widespread prosperity, resilient communities, and inclusive growth.We channel our efforts into three critical areas: boosting economic growth while preparing for potential risks, promoting equity and inclusion, and investing in talent and human capital. Through insights, initiatives, and open dialogue, we aim to drive meaningful change and build a more equitable and thriving world.180+ Global business partners100+Academic institutions, civil society, and international  organizations45+Partner governmentsOur initiativesOur initiatives focus on inclusive growth, better jobs and stronger societies. They are organized under three thematic pillars: Fostering economic growth and risks preparedness, investing in talent and human capital, and promoting equity and inclusion.Future of Growth InitiativePromoting and supporting the transition from the growth we have to the growth we need.The Reskilling Revolution InitiativeTransforming education, skill training and learning for tomorrow's economy and society.Global Parity Sprint 2030Accelerating gender parity in economic participation and leadership by 2030.Our impactWe work with partners to advance equity, invest in skills and support more resilient and people-centred economic systems.Preparing 1 billion people for tomorrow’s economyMore than 350 million people around the world are being reached by the Forum's Reskilling Revolution platform since it was launched in January 2020.Closing gender gaps in the private sector benefits over 850,000 womenThe World Economic Forum has supported 14 countries to convene Gender Parity Accelerators that are helping close economic gender gaps.Finding work after fleeing war: helping refugees find jobsWe are working to expand employment opportunities for refugees and accelerate hiring through the Refugee Employment Alliance.Join us in shaping the future of new economy and societyWe believe that progress happens by bringing people together. People from all walks of life, who have the drive and influence to make a positive change. Be part of that change and join our community.World Economic Forum CentresThe world is confronted with a range of unprecedented challenges, and it's crucial for businesses, government, and civil society to work together to find common solutions and take decisive action.Through its Centres, the Forum integrates public-private efforts to achieve greater impact.Centre for the New Economy and SocietyPowered by
